meta.instance_value_policy: Translate UI labels, buttons, helper text, alerts, and system messages only. Do not translate database values or user-entered instance values such as project names, firm names, sector names, cost types, usernames, full names, addresses, remarks, tender IDs, dates, amounts, statuses stored in records, or audit row values.
